/.title: Vivan Mehta — Software Development Portfolio
/.description: Portfolio of Vivan Mehta, aspiring Software Developer and Systems Engineer focused on engineering, drone technology, and problem solving.
p: I enjoy solving real-world problems through engineering, software development, and innovation. My goal is to continuously learn, build meaningful technology, and make a lasting impact.
Engineering curiosity with a builder’s mindset.

I recently graduated from Footprints for Learning Charter Academy and will be attending SAIT in the Software Development diploma program. I’m passionate about engineering, drone technology, software development, solving problems, and continuously learning how systems work from the inside out.Outside of school and work, I enjoy basketball, boxing, programming, exploring new technology, and spending time with family and friends. I’m focused on building practical skills, staying curious, and using technology to create meaningful solutions.
Hands-on technical work, leadership, and community service shaped by responsibility and curiosity.
Drone Design • Product Research & Development • Manufacturing Improvements • Flight Testing • Electronics • Precision Soldering • Problem Solving
Leadership • Inventory • Customer Service • Team Management • Food Safety • Opening & Closing
800+ Volunteer Hours • Volunteer of the Month • Youth Leadership Awards • Community Service
A foundation across programming, engineering, technical troubleshooting, and formal software development education.
Python, Django, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, React
Comfortable building and learning across web technologies, backend frameworks, and modern front-end development.
Experience with manufacturing, flight testing, research and development, electronics, and hands-on systems problem solving.
Recent graduate with a strong interest in engineering, technology, and applied problem solving.
Expected 2028 — focused on building professional software development skills and a strong technical foundation.

My long-term goal is to become a software developer, systems engineer, and entrepreneur who creates innovative technologies, contributes to the growth of TargetX, and solves real-world engineering problems through practical, meaningful systems.
Building useful systems with software and engineering.
